creator: jan.kokemueller@gmail.com
text:
Hi,
I was also sad to see the Warsow port in a broken state. So I tried to 
update the port to 1.0.3. Of course I didn't check the bug tracker 
before I did that...
I've pushed it to Github:
<https://github.com/jiixyj/freebsd-ports/commit/81073f98d37815e0f62c4187b41e923151c9719b>

I've tested it only with Clang from FreeBSD 10/amd64 and it works fine 
after a small patch (patch-ui__as__asbind.h). I also needed to remove 
the linker options for libstdc++ and libsupc++ from the Makefiles.

I've also encountered the menu crash and managed to work around it after 
many hours of debugging. Some menu animation doesn't play nice with 
FreeBSD, so I included a patch to disable the animations 
(patch-basewsw__ui__porkui__template.rml). It modifies some GUI code 
inside a pk3, so I first extract that pk3 in the pre-patch section. Then 
I include only this patched file in the plist. The game will prefer this 
file over the file in the pk3.

In the warsow-data port, I've clarified the licensing.

Hopefully you can integrate the good bits into your port :)
